product: Write data from Microsoft Excel back to Databricks
tagline: Use the Databricks Excel Add in to write data from Microsoft Excel back to a Unity Catalog table.
what_it_does: Use the Databricks Excel Add in to write data from Microsoft Excel back to a Unity Catalog table. Create a new table or overwrite an existing table in Databricks without leaving Excel. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Use the Databricks Excel Add in to write data from Microsoft Excel back to a Unity Catalog table. Create a new table or overwrite an existing table in Databricks without leaving Excel.

capabilities.title: To create a new table

key_takeaway: Use the Databricks Excel Add in to write data from Microsoft Excel back to a Unity Catalog table.
